title: penstemon secundiflorus
intro: Penstemon secundiflorus, also known as Rocky Mountain beardtongue or Purple beardtongue, is a perennial flowering plant native to the western United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Penstemon secundiflorus include relief from sore throats, coughs, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing. Penstemon secundiflorus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, with some herbalists recommending it for use in topical applications to promote skin health and reduce inflammation.
